title: In the Garbage
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew's Goa Constrictor shrinks him, Judy & Thudd to the size of bugs and sends them on a wild adventure in a garbage dump!

q.en: What is the Goa Constrictor in Andrew's classroom?
q.zh: 在安德鲁的教室里，Goa 巨蛇（Goa Constrictor）到底是什么？

options.en: Andrew's giant garbage-shrinking machine shaped like a snake
options.zh: 安德鲁发明的、像蛇一样的巨型垃圾缩小机器

options.en: A real pet snake Andrew keeps in his desk
options.zh: 安德鲁养在课桌里的真宠物蛇

options.en: The class guinea pig named Howard
options.zh: 名叫霍华德的班级豚鼠

explain.en: The Goa Constrictor is Andrew's invention. 'Goa' stands for Garbage Goes Away — it swallows garbage and squeezes the empty space out of atoms to make it super-small.
explain.zh: Goa 巨蛇是安德鲁的发明。Goa 代表“垃圾消失”(Garbage Goes Away)——它吞下垃圾，把原子间的空隙挤掉，让垃圾变得超级小。

q.en: After the Goa Constrictor shrinks them, about how big are Andrew and Judy?
q.zh: 被 Goa 巨蛇缩水后，安德鲁和朱迪大约变得多大？

options.en: About the size of a cockroach
options.zh: 大约有一只蟑螂那么大

options.en: About the size of a dog
About the size of a basketball
options.zh: 大约有一个篮球那么大

explain.en: When Andrew wakes up on the tiny garbage, he says, 'I must be about as big as a cockroach,' and Thudd adds, 'Small cockroach.'
explain.zh: 当安德鲁在微小的垃圾上醒来时，他说：“我大概只有一只蟑螂那么大了。” 撒得（Thudd）补充道：“很小的蟑螂。”

q.en: Who is the tall boy with black hair that Andrew calls 'Germy'?
q.zh: 那个黑头发的高个子男生、被安德鲁叫做“脏鬼”(Germy) 的是谁？

options.zh: 杰里米·博加特，一名同学
雨果·威尔逊，垃圾场经理

explain.en: Jeremy Bogart is the tall boy with black hair who delivers garbage bags and teases Andrew. The other kids call him 'Germy Booger.'
explain.zh: 杰里米·博加特是个黑头发的高个子男生，他送来垃圾袋并捉弄安德鲁。其他孩子叫他“脏鬼鼻涕虫”(Germy Booger)。

q.en: What does Jeremy's invention, the Excuse-O-Matic, do?
q.zh: 杰里米的发明“借口制造机”(Excuse-O-Matic) 有什么用？

options.en: It makes up excuses for any situation
options.zh: 它能为任何情况编出借口

options.en: It shrinks garbage into tiny specks
options.zh: 它能把垃圾缩小成小颗粒

options.en: It is a telescope and microscope
options.zh: 它是一台望远镜兼显微镜

explain.en: Jeremy clicks the button and the ball whirs out excuses like 'My little brother ate my homework.' Judy calls them lies.
explain.zh: 杰里米按下按钮，球就呼呼地转出各种借口，比如“我弟弟把我的作业吃了”。朱迪说那都是谎言。

q.en: According to Andrew, how much garbage does every person make each day?
q.zh: 根据安德鲁说的，每个人每天制造多少垃圾？

explain.en: Andrew says each person makes five pounds of garbage every day — that's thirty-five pounds a week and over 1,800 pounds a year.
explain.zh: 安德鲁说每个人每天制造五磅垃圾——也就是每周三十五磅、每年超过一千八百磅。

q.en: What is the name of Hugo Wilson's one-legged seagull?
q.zh: 雨果·威尔逊那只只有一条腿的海鸥叫什么名字？

explain.en: Hugo feeds peanuts to his one-legged seagull named Matilda, who carries peanuts to a nest across the road at the dump.
explain.zh: 雨果把花生喂给那只只有一条腿、名叫玛蒂尔达的海鸥，它会把花生带到路对面垃圾场里的巢里。

q.en: What do red wriggler worms make after they eat garbage and paper?
q.zh: 红蚯蚓（red wriggler）吃掉垃圾和纸以后，会制造出什么？

explain.en: Hugo uses red wriggler worms in bins to turn stinky garbage into plant food. The worms poop out 'castings,' which are super food for plants.
explain.zh: 雨果用箱子里的红蚯蚓把臭烘烘的垃圾变成植物的食物。蚯蚓排出的“虫粪”是植物的超级养料。

q.en: According to the True Stuff section, what makes garbage slimy, stinky, and weird-colored?
q.zh: 根据“真实知识”(True Stuff) 部分，是什么让垃圾变得黏糊、发臭、还变色？

explain.en: Thudd explains that bacteria, funguses, and molds break garbage down. Without them, Earth would be piled hundreds of miles high with garbage.
explain.zh: 撒得解释说，是细菌、真菌和霉菌把垃圾分解掉的。如果没有它们，地球会被垃圾堆成几百英里高。

q.en: The word 'centipede' means 'hundred feet,' but how many feet do real centipedes have?
q.zh: “centipede”(蜈蚣) 这个词意思是“百足”，但真正的蜈蚣其实有多少只脚？

explain.en: True Stuff says centi means 'hundred' and pede means 'feet,' but centipedes have from 30 to over 300 feet. (750 feet belongs to the millipede with the most legs.)
explain.zh: “True Stuff”说 centi 是“百”、pede 是“足”，但蜈蚣只有 30 到 300 多只脚。（750 只是脚最多的千足虫。）

q.en: Why don't you notice a bad smell after staying in a stinky place for a few minutes?
q.zh: 为什么在臭的地方待几分钟后，你就闻不到臭味了？

options.en: Your brain stops paying attention to signals from your nose
options.zh: 你的大脑不再理会鼻子传来的信号

explain.en: True Stuff explains the smell hasn't gone away — your brain just stops paying attention to the signals from your nose.
explain.zh: “True Stuff”解释说，臭味并没有消失——只是你的大脑不再理会鼻子传来的信号了。
